name: rung_466_frontier_failure_exception_rule_partition
utterances: Use no_notice/1, emergency/1, liable/1, argued/2, conceded/2.
assert rule liable(C) :- no_notice(C), not emergency(C).

utterances.utterance: Counsel argued case_red had no notice.
Counsel conceded case_blue was emergency response despite no notice.
clarification_answers: Set conceded(counsel, emergency_case_blue). Set no_notice(case_blue). Set emergency(case_blue).
